{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320131147576427309DA113D65762\"}"},"total":19003},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7364447997815096088","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有深度，涉及到很大的一盘棋！如果最亲的人都在算计，生活在这种环境下，没疯都逼疯。感情线，紫玲是败笔，鱼儿等是点睛。张无忌的女人缘。少了韦小宝赢来的女人霸气。如果所有女人都跳出来帮一把。至少，少奋斗几十年。整体感觉，以女人为线，努力为点。串连所有故事。加油！很好看。肥而不腻！","text_exts":[{"e":60,"s":57,"text":"张无忌","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%BC%A0%E6%97%A0%E5%BF%8C\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177398350713D65762%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227364447997815096088%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226569997713717333000%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%A0%E6%97%A0%E5%BF%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714672343,"group_id":"6569997713717333000","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N590ADjdC1w9kbAooBJq0qdPzg6pL3CWk3127HyNiBoY","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3351787038051326","user_name":"随心所欲的苏霸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3351787038051326","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6569997713717333000","book_info":{"abstract":"论潜力，不算天才，可玄功武技，皆可无师自通。论实力，任凭你有万千至宝，但定不敌我界灵大军。我是谁？天下众生视我为修罗，却不知，我以修罗成武神。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4df573120c31961c5bc31173adfa4a17","author":"善良的蜜蜂","author_id":"","book_id":"6569997713717333000","book_name":"修罗武神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"15.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":258,\"name\":\"传统玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258\u0026name=传统玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6570539288402870797","read_count":"156691","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"14914532"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"6618","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/4514d9fe5279e661a7e5105cc1d68565~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779167507\u0026x-signature=V5Briy3is%2FEP%2B38E5OpRhGHa%2BcY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1770"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320131147576427309DA113D65762\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读304小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":9,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1092922,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":11192},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6860507524987535368","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"追了四年了，伴着楚枫从十五岁的少年成长至今，一路的艰辛与坎坷，虽然说作者大大还是会有许多出错的地方，但依旧精彩，愿修罗伴吾一生，祝武神一路长虹……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":15
